name: rush
short_description: This is a competitive game with exquisite art style and a relaxed and enjoyable experience.
detailed_description:
This is a competitive game with exquisite art style and a relaxed and enjoyable experience.
On the way to the brave, you need to constantly become stronger and defeat the monsters ahead. Choose the appropriate attack target and attack or defend at a reasonable time. Just aim at it to release skills, consume enemy health, and defeat them. Does this require skill or luck?
New animation art style production, smoother visuals, rich levels, and more hidden props to enhance your skills, eliminate all enemies and win victory.
When attacking enemies, don't forget to pay attention to your own health. Eliminate all enemies before your health runs out to win! Hurry up and challenge your friends!
